rules.Name: Feature Carrier
rules.Text: At the start of the game, before players deploy, choose two Deployable Features from the Shaltari Deployable Features List (duplicates are allowed). This Ship starts the game carrying those Deployable Features.

flavour:
A sister class of the Euclase, the Boracite is configured for pure ship-ship combat through increased firepower. Here, the Euclase's launch bays are replaced with a linked pair of disintegrator batteries. Coupled with the twinned Thermal Lance Cannons, this ship is at its most deadly when its captain, who must possess time-honed skill, can manoeuvre into an optimal firing position prior to unleashing all weapons, pushing the ship's enhanced power matrix to the limit.
This killing power is supplemented by a standard feature, thus far, of all Shaltari pocket battleships –launch clamps for self-deploying surface assets. On the Boracite, these are often employed as launch and forget assets while en-route to the next kill, although if targets are plentiful, the Boracite may remain on station of unleash salvos of annihilating energy at its foes.
